---

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant type with an [x] -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 📊 Data update (changes to data files)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Maintenance (refactoring, tooling, dependencies)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

---

## Data Quality Checklist
<!-- If this PR includes data changes, complete the following -->

- [ ] Data follows the correct JSON schema
- [ ] All required fields are present and validated
- [ ] No duplicate entries introduced
- [ ] Links/URLs are valid and accessible
- [ ] Entity references (slugs, IDs) are correctly formatted
- [ ] Data has been tested locally

---

## Testing Checklist

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code/data
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

---

## License Confirmation

By submitting this pull request, I confirm that:

- [ ] My contributions are licensed under the same license as this project
- [ ] I have the right to submit this work under the project's license
- [ ] I understand that my contributions will be publicly available at changemappers.org

---

## Reviewer Guidelines
<!-- For reviewers -->

Please check:
1. Code/data quality and adherence to project standards
2. Schema validation passes
3. No breaking changes introduced
4. Documentation is updated if needed
5. All automated checks pass

---
